summary: Added verdictAppend hook to cmdSynthesize in synthesize.mjs. Extensions with 'verdictAppend' capability fire after parseFindings and before runCompoundGate/computeVerdict; their returned { findings } arrays are validated (severity + text must be strings) and merged into the findings list so both the compound gate and verdict computation see the full enriched set. Updated fireExtension JSDoc and added 5 unit tests covering the happy path, verdict impact, non-array guard, per-finding validation, and payload forwarding.
